summary.en: Oman BESS projects may request IEC 62619 evidence for industrial lithium secondary cells and batteries used in stationary energy storage. The file should identify the tested cell or battery model, chemistry, capacity, protection functions, abuse-test coverage, BMS limits, and production configuration used in the Oman project.
summary.zh: 阿曼BESS项目可能要求固定式储能使用的工业锂二次电芯和电池具备IEC 62619证据。文件应识别测试的电芯或电池型号、化学体系、容量、保护功能、滥用测试覆盖范围、BMS限制以及阿曼项目采用的生产配置。
summary.zht: 阿曼BESS項目可能要求固定式儲能使用的工業鋰二次電芯和電池具備IEC 62619證據。文件應識別測試的電芯或電池型號、化學體系、容量、保護功能、濫用測試覆蓋範圍、BMS限制以及阿曼項目採用的生產配置。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes, safety requirements for industrial lithium secondary cells and batteries
Oman DGSM or project specifications adopting IEC battery safety evidence

summary.en: China uses GB 44240-2024 for compulsory lithium-ion cell and battery safety for electric energy storage, and GB/T 36276-2023 for recommended technical requirements. Clause coverage and test conditions should be mapped to IEC 62619 instead of treated as identical.
summary.zh: 中国以GB 44240-2024作为电力储能用锂离子电芯和电池强制安全要求，并以GB/T 36276-2023作为推荐性技术要求。应将条款覆盖和试验条件映射至IEC 62619，而不是视为完全相同。
summary.zht: 中國以GB 44240-2024作為電力儲能用鋰離子電芯和電池強制安全要求，並以GB/T 36276-2023作為推薦性技術要求。應將條款覆蓋和試驗條件映射至IEC 62619，而不是視為完全相同。

gap.en: The main gap is test-standard identity and model scope. A Chinese GB battery report may not show every IEC 62619 clause, edition, sample configuration, or BMS protection condition requested by an Oman buyer. Exporters should add an IEC 62619 report or a clause-by-clause bridge accepted by the project owner.
gap.zh: 主要差距在测试标准身份和型号范围。中国GB电池报告未必显示阿曼买方要求的全部IEC 62619条款、版本、样品配置或BMS保护条件。出口商应补充IEC 62619报告，或提供项目业主接受的逐条款桥接表。
gap.zht: 主要差距在測試標準身份和型號範圍。中國GB電池報告未必顯示阿曼買方要求的全部IEC 62619條款、版本、樣品配置或BMS保護條件。出口商應補充IEC 62619報告，或提供項目業主接受的逐條款橋接表。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific unless adopted by DGSM, tender, utility, insurer, or purchaser requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market under GB 44240-2024; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended and commonly referenced

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB 44240 and GB/T 36276 evidence should not be presented as IEC 62619 certification unless the actual IEC 62619 scope, edition, model, and configuration are covered.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非实际IEC 62619范围、版本、型号和配置均被覆盖，否则不应将GB 44240和GB/T 36276证据表述为IEC 62619认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非實際IEC 62619範圍、版本、型號和配置均被覆蓋，否則不應將GB 44240和GB/T 36276證據表述為IEC 62619認證。
